title: Go-replacement BF: Go-test replacement tranche for residual Python tests
summary: Replaced the remaining live references to deleted Python tests with Go-native validation commands, Go evidence targets, and regression enforcement across planning, bootstrap, and repo-managed documentation surfaces.

validation.command: rg -n "pytest|tests/test_.*\\.py" README.md docs scripts src bigclaw-go --glob '!bigclaw-go/internal/regression/**' --glob '!bigclaw-go/internal/planning/planning_test.go' --glob '!bigclaw-go/internal/workflow/**' --glob '!bigclaw-go/internal/policy/**' --glob '!bigclaw-go/internal/observability/**' --glob '!bigclaw-go/internal/events/**'
